summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Journal Entry (JE) Module. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - page loads correctly, all UI elements present, filters work, create dialog functional, view dialog shows entry details, export generates CSV.
passed_tests: GET /api/finance/journal-entries returns 401 for unauthenticated users
GET /api/finance/journal-entries returns 200 for Founder role
GET /api/finance/journal-entries returns 200 for Admin role
GET /api/finance/journal-entries returns correct response structure (entries, total, page, limit, total_pages)
Pagination parameters (page, limit) work correctly
Status filter 'posted' works correctly
Status filter 'reversed' works correctly
Date range filter (start_date, end_date) works correctly
Search filter works correctly
POST /api/finance/journal-entries requires date field
POST /api/finance/journal-entries requires narration field
POST /api/finance/journal-entries requires minimum 2 lines
POST /api/finance/journal-entries validates debit = credit balance
POST /api/finance/journal-entries requires at least one debit and one credit line
POST /api/finance/journal-entries creates valid JE with auto-generated reference number (JE-YYYYMM-XXXX)
POST /api/finance/journal-entries/{je_id}/reverse returns 404 for non-existent JE
POST /api/finance/journal-entries/{je_id}/reverse creates reversal entry with swapped debit/credit
POST /api/finance/journal-entries/{je_id}/reverse returns 400 for already reversed JE
GET /api/finance/journal-entries/export/excel returns correct structure (rows, total, exported_at)
GET /api/finance/journal-entries/export/excel with date filter works
GET /api/finance/journal-entries/export/excel with status filter works
GET /api/finance/journal-entries/{je_id} returns 404 for non-existent JE
GET /api/finance/journal-entries/{je_id} returns correct JE details
Journal Entry page loads at /finance/journal-entry
Sidebar shows 'Journal Entry' tab under Finance menu
Warning banner about operational transactions is visible
New Journal Entry button opens create dialog
Create dialog has Date, Narration, Line Items table
Line Items has Account dropdown, Debit, Credit, Line Narration columns
Add Line button visible in create dialog
Total Debit/Credit calculated and balance check shown
Submit button disabled when not balanced
Status filter dropdown works (All, Posted, Reversed)
Date range filters work
Search by reference/narration works
Export button generates CSV download
View button opens entry details dialog
View dialog shows JE reference, date, status, narration, line items, totals
Reversal entries show 'This is a reversal entry' info banner
Reverse button visible only for non-reversed entries
Admin role can access Journal Entry page
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API correctly implements all JE CRUD operations with proper validation
Debit=Credit validation working correctly - blocks save if mismatch
Reversal flow correctly swaps debit/credit and marks original as reversed
Frontend has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Warning banner correctly displayed about not using for operational transactions
Export generates CSV with all required fields
seed_data_creation: Created test journal entries during backend testing (TEST_JE_*, TEST_REVERSAL_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journal Entry module fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/finance/journal-entries, GET /api/finance/journal-entries/{je_id}, POST /api/finance/journal-entries/{je_id}/reverse, GET /api/finance/journal-entries/export/excel. Frontend page at /finance/journal-entry with data-testid attributes: journal-entry-page, create-je-btn, export-btn, status-filter, start-date-filter, end-date-filter, search-input, je-date, je-narration, je-line-{idx}-account, je-line-{idx}-debit, je-line-{idx}-credit, submit-je-btn. Permissions: finance.journal_entry.view/create/edit/reverse. Allowed roles: Admin, Founder, FinanceManager, CharteredAccountant (view-only).

backend_api.GET /api/finance/journal-entries: WORKING - Returns paginated list with filters
backend_api.POST /api/finance/journal-entries: WORKING - Creates JE with validation (debit=credit, min 2 lines)

frontend_ui.sidebar_navigation: WORKING - Journal Entry tab visible under Finance menu
frontend_ui.warning_banner: WORKING - Warning about operational transactions displayed
frontend_ui.create_dialog: WORKING - Opens with Date, Narration, Line Items
frontend_ui.balance_validation: WORKING - Shows 'Need Debit & Credit' or 'Balanced' badge
frontend_ui.filters: WORKING - Status, date range, search all functional
frontend_ui.view_dialog: WORKING - Shows JE details with line items
frontend_ui.reverse_button: WORKING - Visible only for non-reversed entries
